code:
type Command =
  | Ping
  | Greet(name: String)
  | Add(x: Int, y: Int)

fn execute(_ cmd: Command) -> Unit
  match cmd
  when Ping
    print("pong")
  when Greet(name: name)
    print("hello, #{name}")
  when Add(x: x, y: y)
    print("sum=#{x + y}")
  end
end

execute(Command.Ping)
execute(Command.Greet(name: "tyra"))
execute(Command.Add(x: 7, y: 35))
